notes: Family-specific C2 checkin should retrieve STRRAT, C2, or official callback guidance.
query: STRRAT CnC Checkin Malware Command and Control

notes: SMB exploit query should prefer MS17-010 and SMB protocol documents.
query: MS17-010 SMB exploit port 445 SMBv1 EternalBlue

notes: Beacon response should retrieve implant/backdoor guidance, not only exploit.
query: DOUBLEPULSAR Beacon Response implant backdoor post-exploitation

notes: Low-confidence anomaly query should retrieve false-positive boundaries.
query: ICMPv6 invalid checksum unknown code protocol anomaly

notes: Port breadth and failed connections should retrieve scan guidance.
query: many destination ports failed connections failed_conn_rate unique_dst_ports

notes: SYN-heavy scan query should retrieve TCP flags and scan documents.
query: TCP SYN scan tcp_syn_count tcp_ack_count Nmap reconnaissance

notes: SQLi query should retrieve web exploit and HTTP URI interpretation.
query: SQL injection union select HTTP URI web exploit

notes: XSS query should retrieve XSS and web exploit documents.
query: XSS script injection javascript onerror HTTP parameter

notes: Traversal query should retrieve path traversal and HTTP evidence guidance.
query: directory traversal ../ passwd path traversal LFI

notes: Command injection query should retrieve shell command exploit guidance.
query: command injection wget curl shell metacharacters

notes: DNS tunnel query should retrieve tunnel signature and false-positive boundary.
query: DNS tunnel long domain encoded subdomain TXT query

notes: Periodic TLS query should retrieve both C2 and false-positive boundary guidance.
query: periodic TLS SNI beacon HTTPS callback C2

notes: Bruteforce query should retrieve auth or remote-access boundary guidance.
query: SSH brute force login attempt repeated authentication failures

notes: High-volume query should retrieve both DDoS and high-volume false-positive guidance.
query: high volume traffic possible DDoS flood packet_count conn_count

notes: Normal SMB query should retrieve boundary rule that port 445 alone is not exploit.
query: normal SMB traffic port 445 without exploit alert file sharing

notes: Closed-set scan boundary card.
query: TA43_01 TA43_02 Nikto OpenVAS Nmap NSE service enumeration multi-port scan

notes: Closed-set authentication boundary card.
query: TA01_01 TN01_01 repeated login authentication failures normal login

notes: Closed-set exploit versus ordinary web boundary card.
query: TA01_02 TN01_01 exploit payload abnormal URI normal web access

notes: Direction-aware backdoor access/callback boundary card.
query: TA11_01 TA11_02 attacker initiated webshell access victim callback

notes: Callback versus normal encrypted outbound boundary card.
query: TA11_02 TN01_01 periodic fixed remote HTTPS DNS normal browsing

notes: Visible command strings need exploit/access context.
query: exploit_indicators xp_cmdshell exec cmd.exe whoami TA01_02 TA11_01

notes: Structured vulnerability scanner indicators.
query: vuln_scan_indicators Nikto OpenVAS Nmap NSE high URI fanout

notes: Upload does not prove persistence.
query: implant_indicators multipart webshell php upload TA03_01

notes: Structured access and callback boundary.
query: backdoor_access_indicators c2_indicators webshell periodic fixed endpoint

notes: Structured auth failure interpretation.
query: auth_indicators repeated HTTP login SSH FTP failed authentication

notes: Encrypted traffic visibility limits.
query: payload_visibility encrypted_tls metadata_only missing payload not normal

notes: Authentication timing and explicit failure boundary.
query: auth_attempt_group attempt_rate inter_attempt_intervals failure_burst repeated failed login

notes: Scan burst and probe-rate interpretation.
query: scan_group scan_duration probe_rate burstiness_score URI fanout TA43_01 TA43_02

notes: Beacon timing must retrieve benign periodic counterexamples.
query: interval_summary regularity_score fixed_endpoint_duration benign_periodic_hints update WPAD DNS NTP

notes: Ordered exploit/upload/access sequence guidance.
query: ordered_event_summary scan_to_exploit_delta exploit_to_upload_delta upload_to_access_delta

notes: Port scan fanout boundary should retrieve TA43 scan card.
query: port scan query dst_port fanout many ports high failed_conn_rate probe_rate burstiness TA43_01 TA43_02 boundary

notes: Vulnerability scan query should retrieve URI/404/scanner boundary.
query: vulnerability scan query URI fanout HTTP 404 rate scanner User-Agent CVE path probe path keywords TA43_02

notes: Brute-force query should retrieve auth attempt boundary.
query: brute force query auth_attempt_group failed_login_count attempt_rate inter-attempt interval failure burst success-after-failure SSH FTP HTTP login

notes: Exploit/upload/access query should retrieve attack-chain boundary.
query: exploit upload access query command injection SQLi path traversal multipart/form-data webshell filename payload delivery backdoor endpoint cmd parameter TA01_02 TA03_01 TA11_01

notes: Beacon/periodic query should retrieve C2 versus benign periodic boundary.
query: beacon periodic query beacon_score regularity_score fixed endpoint small packets TLS SNI DNS query software update DNS refresh NTP cloud sync health check WPAD TA11_02 TN01_01
